judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (a hand-drawn line graph on grid paper with four line categories, 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps, and axis titles), but B adds specific axis ranges, legend line types, and text annotations not mentioned by A, without contradiction.
original_image_tags: A hand-drawn line graph on grid paper titled by its axes. The paper is marked at the top center as "THE FREDERICK POST CO., CHICAGO, ILL." and "331-20 20X20 PER INCH". A "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp is visible at the top center, partially obscured by the graph border, and again at the bottom center over the x-axis label. The graph plots four categories of aerial observations over a 24-hour period. The paper has two hole-punch marks on the left margin.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A hand-drawn line chart on graph paper titled by labels “Number of Observations” and “Time of Sightings,” with four plotted series in a legend: Meteorites, Meteors, Green “Fireballs,” and “Disks” or Variations; several peaks are annotated “METEORITE MAXIMUM,” “METEOR MAXIMUM,” “GREEN ‘FIREBALL’ MAXIMUM,” and “‘DISK’ or VARIATION MAXIMUM,” and the page is stamped “CONFIDENTIAL.”*
